allow: PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); Start-Process -FilePath "ngrok" -ArgumentList "http 8080" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:4040/api/tunnels" -TimeoutSec 5; $r.tunnels | ForEach-Object { $_.public_url } } catch { "Could not reach ngrok API - check the ngrok window for the URL" })
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['public_url']\) for t in d.get\('tunnels',[]\)]")
